name: TrendRadar
what_it_does: An AI-driven trend monitoring platform that aggregates public opinion from multiple social and news sources, applies AI analysis (sentiment, summaries, predictions), and delivers structured notifications via 9 channels including Telegram, Slack, and WeChat.
use_cases: Real-time monitoring of trending topics across social media and news for brand or topic intelligence
AI-summarized trend reports with sentiment analysis delivered on a schedule
RSS feed aggregation with keyword filtering to reduce information overload
MCP-enabled natural language trend queries for AI agent workflows
Multi-language trend monitoring with AI-powered translation
not_for: Deep social media analytics requiring historical data export or raw data access
Enterprise compliance monitoring requiring certified data provenance
Platforms needing guaranteed data completeness (dependent on public source availability)
best_when: You want a self-hosted, lightweight trend intelligence system that can push AI-analyzed summaries to messaging apps and also expose trend data to AI agents via MCP.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-grade social listening with SLAs (e.g., Brandwatch, Sprinklr), or require raw data access for custom analytics.

auth.notes: API keys required for AI providers (DeepSeek, OpenAI, Gemini). Notification channel tokens (Telegram bot token, Slack webhook, etc.) configured per channel.

pricing.notes: GPL-3.0 licensed. AI provider API costs (OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini) apply based on analysis volume.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: MCP integration added at v4.0.0 as secondary feature; quality relative to primary notification-focused design.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read/query tools are idempotent. Notification push operations are not.
known_agent_gotchas: MCP support was added at v4.0.0 as an add-on to a primarily notification-focused tool - may have rough edges
GPL-3.0 license requires derivative works to also be GPL - may restrict commercial embedding
AI analysis quality depends on chosen provider and API key availability
47.6k stars suggests wide community use but primary audience appears to be Chinese-speaking users based on primary documentation language
Notification channel configuration (9 channels) adds setup complexity before MCP functionality is usable

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
